title: Issues with Hidden Subitems in Shared Views
excerpt:

posts.author: dkolotauri1 (Dimitri)
posts.cookedHtml:
I created a view, hid some items and subitems, and saved the view. However, when I shared it, only the items were hidden, not the subitems.

In conclusion, in the shared view link, the subitems are not hidden even if they were set to be hidden.

posts.author: malia.monday (Malia)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Dimitri! Could you share with me a screenshot of the filters that you applied to the view in order to hide the subitems? Would love to better understand the setup for the view, so I can look into this further for you!

posts.author: dkolotauri1 (Dimitri)
posts.cookedHtml:
Dear Malia,
Thanks for the contacting me,
Embedded you will find applied filters and shared view.
As I have mentioned, when the hide filters are applied on the subitems, it anyway displaying in the shared view.

chrome_NEcnpBiI1C1062×691 45.2 KB

chrome_X9VakN9H5V1031×744 36.7 KB

posts.author: malia.monday (Malia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thank you for providing the additional info! After reviewing our documentation on this feature, I have confirmed that the current behavior is expected. As of now, the hide column feature at the subitem level will not be reflected in the broadcast view.

That said, as a workaround, if you turn on Column permissions for these subitem columns, these will hide them in the broadcast view. Hope this helps!
